    P

    paid - Variable in class Entities.Bill
     
    parseIntegerField(TextField, String) - Method in class Controllers.TablesController
    Parses an integer value from a TextField.
    Pay(PaymentRequest) - Method in class handlers.ClientHandler
    Makes a payment request
    PAY - Enum constant in enum class enums.ActionType
     
    PayCommand - Class in commands
    Command implementation for processing payments and finalizing reservations.
    PayCommand() - Constructor for class commands.PayCommand
     
    paymentAlertShown - Variable in class Controllers.SubscriberController
     
    paymentController - Variable in class commands.PayCommand
    Controller responsible for processing payments and generating bill records.
    paymentController - Variable in class logicControllers.DailyFunctionController
     
    PaymentController - Class in Controllers
    Controller for handling payments in the UI.
    PaymentController - Class in logicControllers
    Controller class responsible for handling the payment process within the restaurant.
    PaymentController() - Constructor for class Controllers.PaymentController
     
    PaymentController() - Constructor for class logicControllers.PaymentController
    Initializes a new PaymentController and instantiates the required DAOs for bills, reservations, and tables.
    PaymentHandler - Class in handlers
    Handles server responses related to payment processing.
    PaymentHandler(Label, Label) - Constructor for class handlers.PaymentHandler
    Constructs a PaymentHandler with labels to display the status and amount of the payment.
    PaymentReminderSent - Variable in class Entities.Reservation
     
    PaymentRequest - Class in messages
    Represents a request message to process a payment and finalize a reservation.
    PaymentRequest(int) - Constructor for class messages.PaymentRequest
    Constructs a new PaymentRequest with the specified confirmation code.
    PaymentResult - Class in util
    A utility class used to encapsulate the result of a payment processing operation.
    PaymentResult(boolean, String, Bill) - Constructor for class util.PaymentResult
    Constructs a new PaymentResult with the specified status, message, and bill.
    PENDING - Enum constant in enum class enums.ReservationStatus
    Reservation has been made but not yet confirmed.
    phone - Variable in class Controllers.InformationController
     
    phone - Variable in class Controllers.RegisterationController
    Text fields for user input during registration: - userID: the ID of the user - name: full name - phone: phone number - email: email address - userName: username for login - membershipCode: optional membership code (for subscribers)
    phone - Variable in class Entities.User
     
    phone - Variable in class Entities.WaitingListEntry
    Phone number of the user or guest.
    phone - Variable in class messages.AddToWaitingListRequest
    The user's phone number.
    phone - Variable in class messages.RegisterRequest
    The phone number of the user.
    phoneColumn - Variable in class Controllers.WaitingListController
     
    PhoneColumn - Variable in class Controllers.SubscriberInformationController
     
    port - Variable in class src.ocsf.client.AbstractClient
    The port number.
    port - Variable in class src.ocsf.server.AbstractServer
    The port number
    prevButton - Variable in class Controllers.SubscriberController
     
    prevButton - Variable in class Controllers.SupervisorController
    Button to navigate back to the previous screen.
    previousButton - Variable in class Controllers.CancelReservationController
     
    previousPage() - Method in class Controllers.RestaurantSettingsController
    Navigates back to the supervisor UI.
    previousScene - Static variable in class util.SceneManager
    Stores the FXML filename of the previous scene for navigation purposes.
